redemptionType: Request-based primary withdrawal; daily liquidity on U.S. banking days
liquidityNotes: Maple docs state withdrawals are processed within 24 hours on U.S. banking days and may be serviced faster where liquidity is available. RWA.xyz shows $0 monthly transfer volume and no visible secondary market liquidity, so the score remains conservative despite T+1-style primary redemption.

_meta.notes: minRedemptionAmount is null because RWA.xyz lists primary min investment, not a minimum redemption amount.
